payload.answer: Reject the proposed memory card because it is too ambiguous for durable storage. The subject is unspecified and the preferred option is also unclear.
citations: Proposed statement: "He prefers the other one."

entity_resolution.reason: The statement uses an unresolved pronoun ('He') and an unspecified referent ('the other one'), so the subject and preference target cannot be grounded to durable entities.

details: Blocked due to unresolved pronoun reference.
Blocked due to unspecified preference object.

repair_options: Replace 'He' with the explicit person name or stable entity identifier.
Replace 'the other one' with the explicit option/item being preferred.
Include enough context to identify the comparison set or alternatives.
Resubmit only when both subject and preference target are unambiguous.
